name: apify-creator-factory
description: Apify Creator Factory for generating, testing, polishing, and verified deploying monetizable Apify Actors.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w @creator-factory/api" "npm run dev -w @creator-factory/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @creator-factory/shared && npm run build -w @creator-factory/api && npm run build -w @creator-factory/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @creator-factory/shared && npm run build -w @creator-factory/shared && npm run typecheck -w @creator-factory/api && npm run typecheck -w @creator-factory/web
scripts.typecheck:main-agent: tsc --noEmit --target ES2023 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --strict --skipLibCheck --types node scripts/run-main-agent.ts src/main-agent/*.ts
scripts.typecheck:mcp: tsc --noEmit --target ES2023 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --strict --skipLibCheck --types node src/mcp/local-mcp-server.ts
